case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. DANIEL OLMOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLMOS, DANIEL $4,343.67 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,636.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62305981)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037415), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED APR-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-29-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT OLMOS, DANIEL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62305981) AS TO DEFENDANT OLMOS, DANIEL
